title: heliotropium dasycarpum subsp. dasycarpum
intro: Heliotropium dasycarpum subsp. dasycarpum, a plant species within the borage family (Boraginaceae), is also known as the "Turner's heliotrope" or "Turner's heliotropium." This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Heliotropium dasycarpum subsp. dasycarpum include relief from various conditions such as bronchitis, asthma, and allergies, as well as its potential use as a natural expectorant. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to treat the aforementioned conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
